title: Attach media to post: validate ownership, serialize MediaAttachment in Status
description:
On POST /api/v1/statuses with media_ids: validate each media row (1) belongs to authed account, (2) has post_id=NULL (not already attached), (3) processing is complete (width IS NOT NULL). On post creation, UPDATE media SET post_id=? for each media_id. In Status serialization, include full MediaAttachment objects in media_attachments array.

TEST DISCIPLINE:
- Post with valid image media_ids → media_attachments in response contains full MediaAttachment
- Post with media belonging to other account → 422
- Post with media still processing (width=NULL) → 422 'media is still processing'
- Post with media already attached to another post → 422
- Status with no media: media_attachments is [] not null

DEFENSIVE PROGRAMMING:
- Validate all media_ids in a single query before creating the post — atomic validation
- Maximum 4 media attachments per post (configurable, per Mastodon default)
acceptance_criteria: Valid media attached and in response; another account's media rejected with 422; still-processing media rejected; media_attachments is always []
close_reason: Media attachment to posts already in posting.rs
